title: tandonia marginata
intro: Tandonia marginata, also known as the African giant snail or giant forest snail, is a species of large land snail. It is native to the tropical regions of Africa and is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tandonia marginata include wound healing, reduction of fever, and treatment of respiratory issues, making it a valuable herb in various herbal preparations. The snail is typically dried and then crushed or powdered for use in herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and poultices.
